description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:8 Docker image, with a before_script that runs `time npm prune && exit 0` then `time npm install`, and a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME that stores the node_modules directory and includes untracked files. Define stages init, commit_test, build, acceptance_test, release, and deploy, and set the variable GET_SOURCES_ATTEMPTS to 2. In the init stage add an npm_install job that runs `echo ' '` and saves the node_modules folder as an artifact; in the commit_test stage add a lint job that runs `time npm run lint` and a unit job that runs `time npm run test:unit` and publishes the coverage directory as a 3‑day‑old artifact. In the build stage add commonjs, javascript, and docs jobs that each run `time npm run build:cjs`, `time npm run build:js`, and `time npm run build:docs` respectively, each archiving the build directory as a 3‑day artifact; in the acceptance_test stage add an e2e job that runs `time echo npm run test:e2e` and stores coverage as a 3‑day artifact. Finally, in the deploy stage add a pages job that runs `mkdir public`, `mv build/docs/* public`, and `mv coverage public/coverage`, publishes the public and build directories as artifacts, runs only on the master branch, and deploys to GitLab Pages at https://td7x.gitlab.io/s6.
